task: Establish the in-repo living master tracker. docs/trackers/MASTER_PROGRESS_REPORT.md is the Markdown SOURCE OF TRUTH (full reconciled task list + Reconciled Status + Reconcile Note + Next Blocks queue + pending/duplicates/net-new sections), generated by read-only repo + GitHub reconciliation of the v23/v24 workbook. docs/trackers/exports/ holds the generated xlsx export. LOCKED PROTOCOL: every future block's PR updates its own row's reconciled status in this same Markdown file in the same PR, so the tracker never drifts from main. Docs-only; no code, no DDL, no schema, no runtime change.
